openspec-init.description: Initialize or refresh OpenSpec in the current project
openspec-init.template: Set up OpenSpec for this repository. If openspec/ does not exist, run `npx -y @fission-ai/openspec@latest init`. If it already exists, run `npx -y @fission-ai/openspec@latest update`. Then summarize the generated or changed files.

openspec-propose.template: Use the OpenSpec workflow for this request: $ARGUMENTS. If OpenSpec is not initialized, initialize it first with `npx -y @fission-ai/openspec@latest init`. Create or update the appropriate proposal, design, specs, and tasks under openspec/ before implementation.

beads-init.description: Initialize Beads issue tracking in the current project
beads-init.template: Set up Beads for this repository. First check whether the `bd` command exists. If it is missing, tell me to install it with `brew install beads` or `npm install -g @beads/bd`. If available and .beads/ does not exist, run `bd init`. Then run `bd prime` and summarize the workflow guidance.

beads-ready.template: Use Beads to inspect ready work. Run `bd ready --json` if available, then summarize ready tasks and blockers. If Beads is not initialized, say that `bd init` is needed.

switch-provider.template: Ask the user which provider to use: xiaomi, anthropic, or bedrock. Then edit ~/.config/opencode/oh-my-openagent.json and replace ALL model values (in agents and categories) to use the chosen provider. Mapping: xiaomi main=xiaomi/mimo-v2.5-pro fallback=xiaomi/mimo-v2.5 light=xiaomi/mimo-v2.5 | anthropic main=anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514 fallback=anthropic/claude-haiku-4-20250414 light=anthropic/claude-haiku-4-20250414 | bedrock main=bedrock/anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-20250514-v1:0 fallback=bedrock/anthropic.claude-haiku-4-20250414-v1:0 light=bedrock/anthropic.claude-haiku-4-20250414-v1:0. Main/complex agents: sisyphus, hephaestus, oracle, prometheus, metis, momus, unspecified-high, ultrabrain, deep. Light agents: librarian, explore, multimodal-looker, atlas, sisyphus-junior, quick, artistry, writing, visual-engineering, unspecified-low. Confirm when done.
